creator: kennethsalerno@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #6)
Hi, Mark. Thanks for the information, but is that running on physical PowerMac hw, or a QEMU emulator -M mac99 ?

This bug is being reported on QEMU -M pseries (SLOF fw is throwing the exception).

Just to be sure, I built a static kernel with no dynamic modules and still hit the Data Storage Exception.
